mapper.select: SELECT TABSCHEMA AS schemaName, TABNAME AS tableName, REMARKS AS tableComment, TBSPACE AS tablespace FROM SYSCAT.TABLES WHERE TABSCHEMA = #{schema} AND TYPE = 'T' ORDER BY TABNAME
SELECT TABSCHEMA AS schemaName, TABNAME AS tableName, REMARKS AS tableComment, TBSPACE AS tablespace FROM SYSCAT.TABLES WHERE TABSCHEMA = #{schema} AND TABNAME = #{tableName}

SELECT (C.COLNO + 1) AS ordinalPosition, C.COLNAME AS columnName, C.REMARKS AS columnComment, C.TYPENAME AS dataType, C.LENGTH AS columnLength, C.SCALE AS decimalDigits, CASE WHEN C.NULLS = 'Y' THEN true ELSE false END AS nullable, COALESCE(C.DEFAULT, '') AS defaultValue FROM SYSCAT.COLUMNS C WHERE C.TABSCHEMA = #{schema} AND C.TABNAME = #{tableName} ORDER BY C.COLNO

SELECT KC.COLNAME AS columnName, KC.COLSEQ AS pkPosition FROM SYSCAT.KEYCOLUSE KC INNER JOIN SYSCAT.TABCONST TC ON KC.CONSTNAME = TC.CONSTNAME AND KC.TABSCHEMA = TC.TABSCHEMA AND KC.TABNAME = TC.TABNAME WHERE TC.TABSCHEMA = #{schema} AND TC.TABNAME = #{tableName} AND TC.TYPE = 'P' ORDER BY KC.COLSEQ

SELECT IC.COLNAME AS columnName, I.INDNAME AS indexName FROM SYSCAT.INDEXCOLUSE IC INNER JOIN SYSCAT.INDEXES I ON IC.INDSCHEMA = I.INDSCHEMA AND IC.INDNAME = I.INDNAME WHERE I.TABSCHEMA = #{schema} AND I.TABNAME = #{tableName} AND I.UNIQUERULE != 'P' ORDER BY I.INDNAME, IC.COLSEQ
